data.title: Add eval test case for progressive validation behavior
data.description:
Add new test case to plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml verifying:
- When given sufficient context, the brainstorm skill presents a structured understanding summary before proposing approaches
- The understanding summary covers problem, users, scope, and success in bullet form
- The skill asks gap-closing questions targeting inferred content before drafting the spec

test-exempt: This task modifies only a static YAML config file. Structural assertions are included (YAML validity, pattern presence). The exemption applies specifically to behavioral/LLM-response verification, which can only occur at eval-run time via run-skill-evals.sh — unit tests cannot execute LLM inference. Corresponds to unit exemption criterion 3: static assets where behavioral assertion is not possible at unit-test level.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Valid YAML
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml'))"
- [ ] New test case with assertions
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml')); tests=[t for t in d['tests'] if 'understanding summary' in t.get('description','').lower()]; assert len(tests)>=1 and 'assert' in tests[0], 'Missing test case or assert block'"
